Arabian.description: Arabian horses are one of the oldest breeds, known for their endurance, beauty, and high stamina.

Friesian.care: Daily grooming, mane and tail care
Friesian.description: Friesian horses are famous for their black coat, long flowing mane, and elegant movement.

Kathiawari.description: Kathiawari horses are known for their inward-curving ears and ability to survive in harsh climates.

Marwari.description: Marwari horses are famous for their unique inward-curving ears and were historically used in war.

Mustang.description: Mustang horses are wild horses known for their strength, endurance, and adaptability.
